text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I see... So you felt the need to practice alone.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I know you're a hard worker, so I'm sure you really do just want to be
useful to the others.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: But... don't you think you're pushing yourself a little too hard?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Ayabe...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Ohh, I really appreciate it, you worrying about me. But I... I'll never
be enough if I don't change something.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I've received so much from so many people this year.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Fukukitaru is always there to lend me an ear, or tell my fortune, or
find knickknacks to improve my luck.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Urara has nothing but smiles for me, and kind words I don't deserve,
like how I'm so grown-up and hardworking...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
And Opera O, she's always shining... like a light for me to look to. It's
because of her I can keep my chin up.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: And you, Ayabe...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Me?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
You always give me so much courage. Like... do you remember that
one time?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Ooohhh... There I go again... Slipping on the downhill, bumping into
the rail...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I... I'm such a mess... a bumbling mess... At this rate, I don't think I'm
ever going to be like Opera O...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
(Do I just have to... give up? No, not yet, I should practice at least a
little more...)

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: (Wait... someone else is still here?)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... Urgh.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: (Ayabe's practicing too... She looks a bit tired, though...)

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Um, A-Ayabe?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Doto? ...What, is something the matter?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Hm? O-oh, no, nothing's the matter here... But, are you all right? Are
you sure you're not doing too much?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
This isn't "too much." I'm reaching for the stars, and I can't afford to
stop until I get there.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: The... stars?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Do you think you'll ever reach them? I mean, they're so, so far away...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to reach them—that's why I'm here this late. Aren't you the
same?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Ah...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
When you said that, it made me want to keep running, and one day
reach the stars myself... It was the push I needed.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
So you, and the others... I owe all of you. You're always so nice, and
accepting...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
And me, I'm always clumsy, and useless, and have so much to fix, and
I'm down in the dumps half the time...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: But being with you guys makes me so, so happy.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: S-so that's why, next year, I want to take all of that happiness, and give it back... I have to give it back!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Doto...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I guess this is why I can never let you out of my sight...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
So, um... Anyway, I'm going to practice a little more. Seeing you so
concerned for me gave me a boost of energy...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Well, um... Th-thanks so much!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (She's going down the same path again...)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Well, not that I can stop her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: That night...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Yawn. I'm so tired... And I don't even feel like I improved much... Wait, what's this?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Did I leave something on my desk? Books?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: W-whoa! They're about karuta... and there's so many!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Tips for memorizing the poems, training exercises for finders and
takers... W-wow!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Wait, but... who would've... Oh, there's a note in between the pages...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Work hard and smart.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Ah...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: (Was this Ayabe? She found all these for me?)

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Thank you so much, Ayabe! I'll study hard and get butter at karuta! I mean better!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: A-all right, tonight's going to be an all-night study session!
